original_statement: which season was the only one to premiere in september?
mutated_statement: which something was the only one to do something in a certain time?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement (noun generalization) + Action verb replacement (verb generalization) + Time-detail generalization: "season" → "something" | "premiere" → "do something" | "September" → "a certain time" (season→something | premiere→do something | september→a certain time)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志可见agent在critique中明确指出了问题的模糊性（“does not operationalize the ambiguous query about identifying ‘the only one to do something in a certain time.’”），在after_refine的judge_thought也写明“问题太模糊……无法验证”。尽管如此，agent仍在后续chain中给出了具体答案“Season 1”，并对其理由做出解释（“只有Season 1在三月首播”）。因此Agent既表达了对问题不明确的认识，又基于已有信息进行了猜测并给出具体结论，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”的定义。
